recap:
- RAG architecture requires data storage for both raw source files and processed structured text.
- Delta Lake serves as the unified data management layer, providing ACID transactions and versioning for diverse data types.
- Unity Catalog Volumes act as a governance layer, managing access to raw files with a unified permission model.
- Raw documents are stored in Volumes (Bronze), while parsed and chunked text is stored in Delta Tables (Silver/Gold).
- The data ingestion and processing workflow includes data ingestion, storage in Delta Lake, and chunking for embedding generation.
- Governance controls are applied during data storage, although detailed governance practices are not covered in this module.
